organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Reichman University (previously IDC Herzliya), the first private institution of higher education in Israel, opened its doors in 1994 thanks to the vision of Prof. Uriel Reichman. Reichman University's ten schools offer innovative, dynamic undergraduate and graduate programs that educate Israel's future business, juridical, high-tech, communications, economics, and civic leaders. 
All of the academic programs provide students with both a solid theoretical background and the practical interdisciplinary skills that are essential for success in the 21st century. 

The university’s alumni are leading key positions at government agencies, high-tech companies, and financial institutions. 

Reichman University is unique in its educational methods, which are based on an interdisciplinary approach and the teaching of information technology and global markets. It combines theory with real-world experience and provides its students with proficiencies. 

Our basic outlook, which is rooted in the twin concepts of individual freedom and responsibility, emphasizes student entrepreneurship and leadership alongside a commitment to community service.

Follow us on all social media channels >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

מטרת אוניברסיטת רייכמן (לשעבר הבינתחומי) היא להכשיר את מנהיגות העתיד של מדינת ישראל, באמצעות השכלה בינתחומית, המשלבת ידע תיאורטי מעמיק עם הכשרה מעשית, ובהנחיית סגל מרצים וחוקרים מהאוניברסיטאות המובילות בעולם ובישראל. גישתנו היא הקפדה על מצוינות במחקר ובהוראה, לצד דגש על אחריות חברתית ומעורבות בקהילה. מאז הקמתו, הצליח הבינתחומי הרצליה להיות חלוץ בתחומים רבים ולהוביל מהפכה במערכת ההשכלה הגבוהה בישראל, שאת עקבותיה ניתן לראות כיום במוסדות אקדמיים אחרים.

עקבו אחרינו בכל הרשתות החברתיות >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Tel Aviv University believes in pursuing the next big idea, the next challenge, the next mystery that will advance human knowledge and improve all of our lives. 

TAU is the largest and most multidisciplinary university in Israel, comprised of nine faculties, 106 departments, and 90 research institutes. It’s been consistently ranked as the #1 institution outside the United States in producing graduates who successfully raise venture capital for their start-up companies. We encourage our students to dream big and follow their passions.

The school educates more than 650 undergraduate and graduate students, studying in 6 unique programs for B.Sc. and excellence programs for M.Sc. and Ph.D. The school is part of the European Neuroscience Campus.

• Smart Detection in Azure Application Insights Smart Diagnostics of web app performance changes Dynamic range metric alerts.
• NET development of add-on experiences over Windows Live Messenger.
• BE Engineer on big data services, meeting unique and strict availability and scale requirements.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
In the academic environment in Israel, the Open University of Israel is similar to other universities in its pursuit of excellence and its commitment to superior scientific and scholastic standards. However, it differs in its organizational structure, its curriculum, and its admission requirements. 

The Open University is open to all those who wish to study a single course or a battery of courses, or to pursue a full program of study toward a Bachelor's degree. Enrollment does not require matriculation or any other certificate from another educational institution. Though applicants are not required to provide proof of prior scholastic achievements, their academic achievements are the key to their success at the Open University. Along with its open admission policy, the Open University demands of its students personal qualities without which academic achievements cannot be attained: ambition, motivation, perseverance, responsibility and self-discipline. Students are required to study on their own, practice at home, actively participate in group learning activities, and meet course deadlines and requirements. 

Since 1996, the Open University has offered programs of study leading to a Master's degree. In contrast to the open admission policy for undergraduate studies, admission to graduate studies is contingent on fulfillment of certain requirements. 
The Open University is flexible in structure and organization. Applicants joining the Open University student body are not required to enroll in a faculty or department, but rather in specific courses. An individual enrolled in a course becomes a student of the Open University. 

The structure of studies at the Open University also differs from the structure customary at other universities, as it is not defined by years. Open University students are not first, second or third year students. Student are entitled to determine their own rate of progress and the degree of progress in not measured by units of time ...
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Open University of Israel

companyResolutionResult.description:
Varonis unifies AI-native data security, AI security and governance, and behavior-based threat detection into a single, effortless solution.
 
Core offerings include the Varonis Data Security Platform for AI-native data security, Varonis Atlas for safe and trustworthy AI, Varonis Next-Gen DAM for database security, and Varonis Interceptor for preventing AI-powered social engineering threats.
 
Backed by 24×7×365 expert-led detection and response, Varonis enables organizations to confidently adopt AI, reduce data exposure, and simplify security operations in an evolving threat landscape.
 
Trusted by thousands of leading global enterprises, Varonis is the partner security teams rely on to automatically and effortlessly protect their most critical data and safely accelerate AI innovation.
companyResolutionResult.name: Varonis

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Ben-Gurion University of the Negev is one of Israel’s leading research universities and among the world leaders in many fields. 

It has around 20,000 students and 4,000 faculty members in the Faculties of Engineering Sciences; Health Sciences; Natural Sciences; the Pinchas Sapir Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences; the Guilford Glazer Faculty of Business and Management; the Joyce and Irving Goldman School of Medicine; the Kreitman School of Advanced Graduate Studies; and the Albert Katz International School for Desert Studies. More than 100,000 alumni play important roles in all areas of research and development, industry, health care, the economy, society, culture and education in Israel.

The University has three main campuses: The Marcus Family Campus in Beer-Sheva; the research campus at Sede Boqer and the Eilat Campus, and is home to national and multi-disciplinary research institutes: the National Institute for Biotechnology in the Negev; the National Institute of Solar Energy; the Ilse Katz Institute for Nanoscale Science and Technology; the Jacob Blaustein Institutes for Desert Research; the Ben-Gurion Research Institute for the Study of Israel & Zionism, and Heksherim - The Research Institute for Jewish and Israeli Literature and Culture.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Ben-Gurion University of the Negev

companyResolutionResult.description:
Payoneer is the financial technology company empowering the world’s small and medium-sized businesses to transact, do business, and grow globally. Payoneer was founded in 2005 with the belief that talent is equally distributed, but opportunity is not. It is our mission to enable any entrepreneur and business anywhere to participate and succeed in an increasingly digital global economy. Since our founding, we have built a global financial stack that removes barriers and simplifies cross-border commerce. We make it easier for millions of SMBs, particularly in emerging markets, to connect to the global economy, pay and get paid, manage their funds across multiple currencies, and grow their businesses.

Our only official Help channel on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/payoneer-help/

The university has four campuses: Mount Scopus, The Edmond J. Safra (Givat Ram) Campus, and Ein Kerem (in Jerusalem), and Rehovot.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description: LUISS - Libera Università Internazionale degli Studi Sociali Guido Carli – is an independent university that was created out of a pre-existing Roman institution, Pro Deo, between 1974 and 1978. LUISS offers an innovative educational approach at its four Departments: Economics and Finance, Business and Management, Law, and Political Science. Its goal is not simply to convey knowledge but to “instill flexibility” in young people, giving them a sense of mastery over their future. LUISS has a set number of students (1300 students in the four departments for the 2011/2012 academic year); an admissions entrance test; mandatory full-time attendance; a distinguished teaching staff, both from the academic world and from the highest professional levels; intensive study of foreign languages and IT; a rich and specialized library with a catalogue that can be consulted on the University’s web site; an extensive network of international exchange programs at 100 universities both within and outside of Europe; orientation for secondary school students; help from qualified tutors for the entire duration of the degree program and internships; seminars; and debates. What distinguishes LUISS is its privileged relationship with the business world. Over 200 companies, public and private institutions, and multinationals that collaborate with the University give final year students and new graduates their first opportunities to enter the work world.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Luiss Guido Carli University

companyResolutionResult.description:
Our passion to win drives everything we do. 

We’re a leading developer and publisher of free-to-play social and casual games for mobile and web platforms. We deliver authentic, engaging, and fun experiences to millions of players every day.

Our portfolio features some of the world’s most beloved titles, including Jackpot Party Casino, Gold Fish Casino, Quick Hit Slots, MONOPOLY Slots, Bingo Showdown, and 88 Fortunes Slots.

What sets SciPlay apart is our unique balance of creativity and insight — blending imaginative design, player feedback, and data-driven decisions to craft games that delight and connect with players around the world. Our teams use analytics to understand what players love most, helping us continuously refine gameplay and deliver unforgettable experiences.

💡 A Culture Powered by Innovation
Across our global studios, SciPlay thrives on collaboration, diversity, and creativity. Our leadership team brings over 300 years of combined experience in digital entertainment and empowers our teams to push boundaries, innovate fearlessly, and redefine what’s possible in mobile gaming.

🌍 Headquartered in the U.S. and operating across multiple countries, we’re proud to be part of Light & Wonder, Inc. (ASX: LNW), the leading cross-platform global games company. 

We’re hiring!
Join a team where passion fuels innovation and every win is shared:
👉 sciplay.com/careers

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Ben-Gurion University of the Negev is one of Israel’s leading research universities and among the world leaders in many fields. 

It has around 20,000 students and 4,000 faculty members in the Faculties of Engineering Sciences; Health Sciences; Natural Sciences; the Pinchas Sapir Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences; the Guilford Glazer Faculty of Business and Management; the Joyce and Irving Goldman School of Medicine; the Kreitman School of Advanced Graduate Studies; and the Albert Katz International School for Desert Studies. More than 100,000 alumni play important roles in all areas of research and development, industry, health care, the economy, society, culture and education in Israel.

The University has three main campuses: The Marcus Family Campus in Beer-Sheva; the research campus at Sede Boqer and the Eilat Campus, and is home to national and multi-disciplinary research institutes: the National Institute for Biotechnology in the Negev; the National Institute of Solar Energy; the Ilse Katz Institute for Nanoscale Science and Technology; the Jacob Blaustein Institutes for Desert Research; the Ben-Gurion Research Institute for the Study of Israel & Zionism, and Heksherim - The Research Institute for Jewish and Israeli Literature and Culture.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Ben-Gurion University of the Negev

Every company has a mission. What's ours? To empower every person and every organization to achieve more. We believe technology can and should be a force for good and that meaningful innovation contributes to a brighter world in the future and today. Our culture doesn’t just encourage curiosity; it embraces it. Each day we make progress together by showing up as our authentic selves. We show up with a learn-it-all mentality. We show up cheering on others, knowing their success doesn't diminish our own. We show up every day open to learning our own biases, changing our behavior, and inviting in differences. Because impact matters. 

Microsoft operates in 190 countries and is made up of approximately 228,000 passionate employees worldwide.

companyResolutionResult.description:
Welcome to the Island Enterprise Platform — the ideal environment for enterprise work.

For years, enterprise IT was built around layers of tools that solved real problems, but, together, fought against work instead of enabling it. 

Island reimagines the workspace, designing it around people, not problems, making work smooth and simple, while giving organizations complete control over how work happens.

We started with the Island Enterprise Browser, embedding security, access, and control natively into the center of the workspace. 

But the browser was just the beginning.

Today, the Island Enterprise Platform unifies the work environment into a single space with everything enterprises need: AI enablement, network, secure access, identity, data protection, and endpoint control. Not a stack, but an organic ecosystem that works as one.

The world's leading banks, hospitals, airlines, retailers, manufacturers, and universities are using Island to safely embrace AI, onboard contractors in minutes, enable BYOD, reduce VDI costs, and eliminate infrastructure they no longer need.

Backed by Coatue, Cyberstarts, Insight Partners, Sequoia Capital, and other elite venture funds, we're just getting started.
companyResolutionResult.name: Island

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Fifty years ago, there were only about 100 computers in the entire world; today, it is hard to imagine life without them. Hundreds of millions of computers are involved in every field of knowledge and every area of daily life, from medical diagnosis to electronic banking, from genetic research to online entertainment. The future promises even greater changes, as computers continue to transform our lives in fundamental ways.

Israel has been at the forefront of the worldwide computer revolution, in which the Tel Aviv University School of Computer Science plays an ever-expanding role. In the dynamic universe of computer science, the School maintains a leading edge in both teaching and research. Graduate and undergraduate programs are updated continually, integrating new areas of research as they develop.

Extensive international collaboration between faculty members and colleagues abroad, and cooperation with Israel’s high-tech sector, advance and enrich the School’s wide-ranging research program. Graduates go on to fill leading positions in high-tech companies, Israel’s defense establishment and defense industries, and academic institutions worldwide.

Our product suite uses innovative machine learning and analytics to automate and optimize cloud infrastructure, ensure that workloads and applications always have the best possible infrastructure--always available, always scalable and always at the lowest possible cost. 

Spot’s technology provides insights into cloud costs, recommendations for how to optimize utilization and costs, and automation to implement those recommendations in just a few clicks. Ideal for autoscaling applications, containers, Kubernetes and more, our products 

With over 1,500 customers, from startups to global enterprises, the results speak for themselves: up to 90% lower cloud compute costs, with fully automated scaling and infrastructure management and SLA-based availability. 

Proven products, outstanding customer satisfaction and a world-class team--that combination makes us the right Spot for companies and individuals looking to get the most out of the cloud.

companyResolutionResult.description:
3Q Laboratories is Israel’s newest EMC and Electrical Safety compliance testing lab, established to meet the evolving needs of both local and global tech industries. We help manufacturers, product developers, and engineers across sectors ensure their products meet international regulatory standards. Our lab was built with a focus on precision, reliability, and client needs. Whether you're developing a consumer product, industrial equipment, or a medical device, we provide the testing expertise and compliance guidance to help you bring your product to market with confidence.

Our electrical safety testing services include Hi-Pot, Leakage Current, Protective Bonding, Abnormal Operation, and more. All conducted in accordance with IEC  standards to ensure safe and compliant use.

We also perform a full range of Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) tests, including Radiated & Conducted Immunity, Radiated & Conducted Emissions, ESD, Burst, Surge, Voltage Dips, and more. All EMC testing follows IEC and CISPR standards to support global compliance.
companyResolutionResult.name: 3Q Laboratories

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
In the academic environment in Israel, the Open University of Israel is similar to other universities in its pursuit of excellence and its commitment to superior scientific and scholastic standards. However, it differs in its organizational structure, its curriculum, and its admission requirements. 

The Open University is open to all those who wish to study a single course or a battery of courses, or to pursue a full program of study toward a Bachelor's degree. Enrollment does not require matriculation or any other certificate from another educational institution. Though applicants are not required to provide proof of prior scholastic achievements, their academic achievements are the key to their success at the Open University. Along with its open admission policy, the Open University demands of its students personal qualities without which academic achievements cannot be attained: ambition, motivation, perseverance, responsibility and self-discipline. Students are required to study on their own, practice at home, actively participate in group learning activities, and meet course deadlines and requirements. 

Since 1996, the Open University has offered programs of study leading to a Master's degree. In contrast to the open admission policy for undergraduate studies, admission to graduate studies is contingent on fulfillment of certain requirements. 
The Open University is flexible in structure and organization. Applicants joining the Open University student body are not required to enroll in a faculty or department, but rather in specific courses. An individual enrolled in a course becomes a student of the Open University. 

The structure of studies at the Open University also differs from the structure customary at other universities, as it is not defined by years. Open University students are not first, second or third year students. Student are entitled to determine their own rate of progress and the degree of progress in not measured by units of time ...
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Open University of Israel

Fidelis Security® is the industry innovator in proactive cyber defense, safeguarding modern IT for global enterprises with proactive XDR and CNAPP platforms. Fidelis Security consolidates IT security operations to shrink attack surfaces, automate threat detection, and accelerate analysis, forensics, and response so that organizations remain resilient through cyber-attacks and emerge stronger and more secure. Fidelis Security is trusted by top commercial, enterprise, and government agencies worldwide.

companyResolutionResult.description:
18X Elite Impact is a transformative technology program to nurture the next generation of Israeli startup founders - IDF reservists and young veterans from elite combat and other units.

This 18-month journey is completely free of charge for participants and is backed by a unique community of Israel’s leading entrepreneurs, investors, and innovation leaders who serve as mentors and partners along the way.
The program offers real, practical tools to help participants build high-impact startups from scratch. It includes:
* A 24/7 online learning platform with curated content for founders
* Top-tier mentorship from experienced founders and VCs
* Peer groups for collaboration, support, and accountability
* Professional events and workshops across the startup stack
* Exclusive community with other founders, investors, and ecosystem leaders

For more details or to register as participants or experts or partner with us, please check us out here: https://www.18ximpact.org/about
companyResolutionResult.name: 18X Elite Impact

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Welcome to the Jerusalem College of Technology (JCT), a leading institution where technological innovation meets traditional Judaic studies in the heart of Jerusalem. At JCT, we provide world-class education in technology, health sciences and business, coupled with a rich Judaic studies program that prepares students for leadership in a globalized world.

About Us:

At JCT, we are committed to excellence in education. Our programs in engineering, computer science, health sciences, business, and more are designed to equip students with cutting-edge technical skills and a strong ethical foundation. Our unique blend of modern technology and Jewish values offers a distinctive educational experience.

Why choose JCT?

Top-Tier Education: Our esteemed faculty deliver high-quality instruction in various fields, preparing our students for their future careers.

Comprehensive Judaic Studies: Students don’t have to choose between academic excellence and spiritual growth. Our Judaic studies program is designed to enhance both. Our top-level shiurim and rich religious environment allow students to deepen their spiritual and ethical development while pursuing their academic and professional goals.

Strategic Location: Situated in the historic and vibrant city of Jerusalem, JCT provides a stimulating academic environment enriched by cultural, spiritual and intellectual opportunities.

Supportive Community: We offer a collaborative community where students, faculty, and alumni support each other. Our focus on mentorship and career development ensures that students have the resources they need to excel.

Connect with us to learn more about our programs, events, and opportunities.

Stay Connected: Follow our LinkedIn page for updates, news, and insights. Visit our website or contact us for more information.

companyResolutionResult.description:
Meta's mission is to build the future of human connection and the technology that makes it possible. 

Our technologies help people connect, find communities, and grow businesses. When Facebook launched in 2004, it changed the way people connect. Apps like Messenger, Instagram and WhatsApp further empowered billions around the world. Now, Meta is moving beyond 2D screens toward immersive experiences like augmented and virtual reality to help build the next evolution in social technology.

To help create a safe and respectful online space, we encourage constructive conversations on this page. Please note the following:

• Start with an open mind. Whether you agree or disagree, engage with empathy.
• Comments violating our Community Standards will be removed or hidden. Please treat everybody with respect.
• Keep it constructive. Use your interactions here to learn about and grow your understanding of others.
• Our moderators are here to uphold these guidelines for the benefit of everyone, every day.
• If you are seeking support for issues related to your Facebook account, please reference our Help Center (https://www.facebook.com/help) or Help Community (https://www.facebook.com/help/community).

For a full listing of our jobs, visit https://www.metacareers.com
